title: Elemental Swords
description: Adds five powerful elemental swords - Fire, Water, Earth, Air, and Lightning each with unique abilities and custom ores. Craft your weapon and wield the forces of nature!
body:
# Elemental Swords
adds five unique swords to Minecraft, each themed around one of the basic elements: **Fire**, **Water**, **Earth**, **Air**, and Lightning. Every sword has its own special ability that fits the element it represents, offering a new way to fight mobs and explore the world.

You’ll find new elemental ores hidden throughout the world. Mine them to collect shards, then craft powerful swords using simple but logical recipes. The Fire Sword **burns** enemies on hit, the Water Sword **slows** them down, the Earth Sword weakens them with **fatigue**, the Air Sword boosts your **speed** and **jump** height while you hold it, and the Lightning sword strikes the enemy with **lightning** when you hit them.

This mod is lightweight and beginner-friendly, perfect for players who want to spice up their combat with new tools without overcomplicating the game. More content, including the Lightning Sword and other surprises, is coming in future updates.

Tested only on NeoForge **1.21.4**. Compatability with later versions not guaranteed!

[💎Support Me!](https://ko-fi.com/dani_dev)
